name: jetforge-sdk
summary: JetForge SDK — lightweight client for capability discovery, prompt loading, real-time updates, and JIT credential resolution. v0.5.x is a hard break versus 0.4.x: ResolveRequest reduced to (tool_id, environment); caller passes OBO bearer_token via Authorization header (JETP-082.1 v0.3 path B). Requires JetForge ≥ JETP-082.1 server (POST /api/v1/internal/tools/{tool_id}/credentials/resolve).
author: JetForge Team
